about.name: Hani Safadi
about.blurb: Associate professor in the Terry College of Business at the University of Georgia. Interested in researching and teaching data analytics, online communities, social media, healthcare information technology, and the application of computational methods in management research.
about.address: Benson C420, 610 South Lumpkin Street, Athens, GA 30602

entry.title: Associate Professor
entry.venue: University of Georgia, Terry College of Business

entry.title: Assistant Professor
entry.venue: University of Georgia, Terry College of Business

entry.title: Visiting Assistant Professor
entry.venue: Stevens Institute of Technology, School of Business

entry.title: Software Developer
entry.abstract: Supporting and implementing a multi-clinic Open-Source Electronic Medical System

entry.title: Instructor
entry.venue: McGill University, Desautels Faculty of Management

entry.title: Search Engine Optimization Consultant
entry.abstract: Improving the visibility of the graduate school new website and optimizing it for search engines

entry.title: Research Engineer
entry.abstract: Using statistical machine translation technology to enhance user query experience in Yahoo! Answers

entry.title: Software Developer
entry.abstract: Adaptation of Arexera's search engine technologies to Arabic
